description.ko: FLORA-9은 유기적인 꽃의 기하학적 구조와 고속 데이터 전송 기술을 결합한 생명공학적 하이브리드로, 디지털 자연의 선구자입니다. 이는 자연과 코드가 매끄럽고 빛나는 조화 속에서 공존하는 미래를 상징합니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 is a pioneer in digital nature, a biotechnological hybrid that merges organic floral geometry with high-speed data transmission. It represents a future where nature and code coexist in a seamless, glowing harmony.

prompt: A hyper-realistic, macro cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a sentient digital plant. Its petals are made of iridescent liquid crystal displays showing shifting aurora patterns, with glowing neon fiber-optic veins pulsing with golden data light. The stem is a sleek chrome-carbon composite. The background is a blurred dark void filled with floating binary particles and holographic spores. 8k resolution, ray-tracing, cyberpunk nature aesthetic, soft bokeh.
